sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 2:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 2:1
items.html: Reflected light, meaning the upper light that is not received in phase four, is rejected by her and returns to its place. (Part 3, Chapter 15, item 6)
